title: 菊花賞の後に・燃える心

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To her dismay, Rice Shower is unable to catch up
to Mihono Bourbon at the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon approaches and declares that
Rice Shower is a formidable racer on the same
level as Bourbon herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She acknowledges Rice Shower as her rival and
the two vow to race against one another again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide to enter the Nikkei Sho so that Rice
Shower's abilities can bloom even more.
